name: Oochi Fukuchi
description: Oochi Fukuchi is the commander of the Hunting Dogs special units and has the ability Mirror Lion. ~!However, in reality, he is the leader of the terrorist organization, the Decay of Angels, acting under the alias of Kamui.!~

name: Palma Shishinegura
description: Palma is a girl who works in the Old Market of Minami City, producing and selling living corpses. ~!After catastrophe struck her home region of Morth, Palma died alongside her parents, being reborn as a Choujin. Due to her desire to bring the dead back to live, she gained the power to reanimate corpses with her blood.!~

name: Pony  Tsunotori
description: __Quirk:__ Horn Cannon Pony is a timid girl. As a foreigner, she does not have much knowledge of the language in Japan. She is shown to be rather naive and innocent in personality, learning nasty phrases from Neito Monoma without realizing what those words mean, as shown when Neito tells Pony unkind phrases to tell Class 1-A. Pony is a thoughtful and diligent person. She is the one who made her team not lose against Class 1-A because of her strategy and perseverance. She is highly observant and

name: Riku Yagami
description: Riku has a bright and cheerful personality and is able to become friends with anybody. He is very athletic and has good motor skills but only has an average cardiovascular fitness. Riku has also been recruited for several other clubs (specifically basketball, volleyball and table tennis) in the school, more for his speed and agility rather than his ball skills. He has great acceleration and poor parkour skills because while he can jump and hurdle, he can never land safely.

name: Ruomen
description: Ruomen is a physician of the Inner Court, a physician in the red-light district, and Maomao's father.

name: Sazanka
description: __Height:__ 133 cm Sazanka is a member of Dog Squad. She is easily misunderstood by others because of her foul mouth and mischievous nature, and is treated as a problem child by her teachers. On the other hand, she adores Tsubaki , the leader of the Dog Squad, and refers to her as "Nee-sama".
mediaTitles: In the Heart of Kunoichi Tsubaki
Kunoichi Tsubaki no Mune no Uchi
searchTerms: In the Heart of Kunoichi Tsubaki
Kunoichi Tsubaki no Mune no Uchi

name: Senta
description: __Race:__ Human Yamada Asaemon Senta is the 5th rank Asaemon in the Yamada Clan. After the shogun sent criminals to Kotaku to find the Elixir of Life, he was tasked with being [Yuzuriha's](https://anilist.co/character/137270/Yuzuriha) executioner. Senta is very nervous around others and tends to frequently sweat. He usually remains in the background and goes along with whatever is happening around him but will speak up when he feels that whatever he has to say would be helpful. Senta is capable

name: Su-Yeon Go
description: A professor with an unrivaled figure and a friend of Hae-Seong mother's.

name: Taylor Bartlett
nativeName: テイラー・バートレット
description: Taylor Bartlett is Amy Bartlett's adoptive sister. Her sister, Amy picked her up from the streets despite barely managing to make ends meet for herself. ~!When Amy was taken as the York's daughter, Taylor was sent to an orphanage where she spent years apart from her sister, Amy. It's not until Benedict delivered Amy's letters to her that she start to reminiscence the day she spent with her sister, Amy.!~
mediaTitles: Violet Evergarden: Eternity and the Auto Memory Doll
searchTerms: テイラー・バートレット
Violet Evergarden: Eternity and the Auto Memory Doll

name: Tenma Sumeragi
description: He's the leader of the Summer Troupe and a skillful performer who was a prodigy child actor in his past. He is a thoroughbred with parents that are both movie stars. Because of this, he possesses absolute confidence in his acting and hates to lose. This resulted in him claiming only very few friends. Tenma joined the Mankai Company while he was in the middle of filming a movie, but because of a certain reason, he decided to take on the stage.

name: Tombo Kopoli
description: A fourteen-year-old boy in the city where Kiki settles. He is obsessed with aviation, is a member of a club building a human-powered aircraft, and is at first intrigued only by Kiki's ability to fly. He later becomes her friend, although it is obvious that she awes him. (It is not clear, at least to an English-speaker, whether "Kopoli" is intended as a given name or family name. "Tombo", according to the novel, is a nickname, Japanese for "dragonfly".)

name: You Shindou
description: __Height:__ 176 cm (5'9") __Affiliation:__ Ketsubutsu Academy High School __Quirk:__ Vibrate A second year at Ketsubutsu Academy. His quirk, "Vibrate," allows him to create large tremors similar to earthquakes, but firing off strong attacks leaves him immobile.

name: Youming Ye
description: Rumors say Ye Youming is strange, cold and cruel. True to this, Ye Youming is trully cold and cruel toward some inviduals like the Prime minister Qian's family (except Yun Xi) and the Western tribe as he viewed them as low life and a threat thus doesn't hesitate to kill them. He also shown to be a caculator who knows how to get use of the others and take advantages from the others.

name: Yurie
mediaTitles: My Happy Marriage: The Shape of My Happiness
searchTerms: My Happy Marriage: The Shape of My Happiness

name: Yuu Tosaki
description: Yuu Tosaki is a high-ranked member of the Ministry of Health, Labor and Welfare. Generally, Tosaki has a commanding air about him and wears a serious expression. His answers are always short and to the point. He is also quite blunt and lacks patience. He's quick to anger with certain triggers, such as multiple instances in which he snaps at the mispronunciation of his name - "Tozaki" as opposed to what he claims is correct, "Tosaki". From the very start, Tosaki is shown to be morally ambiguous.

name: Ai Mochizuki
description: **Height:** 160 cm Ai is [Nagi Umino](https://anilist.co/character/166730)'s childhood friend.

name: Alha Korvus
description: __Affiliation:__ Cleaners (Boss) Alha is the boss of the Cleaners. He is strong, reliable and trustworthy, with strong characters like Engine even acknowledging his leadership. He also is charismatic and has the peoples best intentions at heart, welcoming Rudo immediately into the Cleaners because of his faith in his companions.

name: Android 21
description: Android 21 is an Android who appears as the main antagonist of Dragon Ball FighterZ when in her evil persona. Her intellect rivals that of Dr. Gero, though she may be even smarter than he was.

name: Derflinger
description: Saito's talking sword. Seems to have the power to warp people, as seen in the beginning of the third ZNT series: Princesses no Rondo. ~!He shatters after taking a powerful breath of fire from the Ancient Dragon in episode 10 of Zero no Tsukaima F On the episode 12 it's revealed that he's not the "sword", he's a spirit that lives within Gandalfr!~

name: Elpeo Ple
description: Elpeo Ple is a fictional character who appears in Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ. She is an artificially enhanced Newtype, who first appears fighting for Neo-Zeon under Glemy Toto. She pilots the AMX-004-2 Qubeley Mk.II. Her name is a pun on the title of a Japanese manga magazine titled Lemon People, which was often referred to as "L People". Source: Wikipedia

name: Gozuka
description: A man who like cats. Miko gave him a cat she found on the way home.
